sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n13799" key="a)po/sta" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπόστα</orth>, for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀπόστηθι,</foreign> <tns opt="n" TEIform="tns">aor. 2</tns> imper. of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀφίστημι.</foreign> </entryFree>
